inputs.candidate_text: Candidate holds a BSc in Computer Science from Technical University of Munich (2018). Currently employed as Senior Backend Engineer at a mid-size SaaS company, tenure 3 years. Previous role: Backend Developer at a startup, 2 years. Skills listed: Python, Go, PostgreSQL, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines. AWS Solutions Architect certification (2023). Speaks English (fluent) and German (B2). Expected salary range: 75,000-85,000 EUR. Available from July 2026. References available upon request.
